ddls:
CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for which the evaluation was performed */,
  "total_target" REAL /* Total/Target evaluation metric */,
  "jaccard" REAL /* Jaccard evaluation metric */,
  "dice" REAL /* Dice evaluation metric */,
  "volume_similarity" REAL /* Volume Similarity evaluation metric */,
  "false_negative" REAL /* False Negative evaluation metric */,
  "false_positive" REAL /* False Positive evaluation metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used in the experiment */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the result file if available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the user account */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each evaluation result
